rulings.Case Title: LAURA ESMERALDA CONTRERAS VS. CAROL BUTERWORTH et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Mtn To Compel And For Sanctions (Re-Notice)
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, July 08, 2014 line 1. - PLAINTIFF LAURA CONTRERAS' Motion To Compel And For Sanctions (Re-Notice). Plaintiff's Motion to Compel and For Sanctions is GRANTED, no opposition filed. Sanctions granted in the amount of $2,160. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: MOHSIN AHMMED VS. BANK OF AMERICA N.A. et al

rulings.Case Title: GABRIELA GEYER et al VS. MERIDIAN MANAGEMENT GROUP et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Sanctions For Failure To Obey A Court Order
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, July 08, 2014 line 3. -Sanctions For Failure To Obey A Court Order. Motion for Sanctions for Failure to Obey a Court Order is DENIED with prejudice as to the named Plaintiffs. Named Plaintiffs released all their claims. Motion is DENIED without prejudice as to the class members and may be re-filed if and when the class is certified. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: GABRIELA GEYER et al VS. MERIDIAN MANAGEMENT GROUP et al

Plaintiff's Motion to Amended Complaint is GRANTED. Plaintiffs shall file and serve Second Amended Complaint no later than July 9, 2014. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: EDWIN KEITH STEPHENS et al VS. CAL-WESTERN RECONVEYANCE CORP. et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, July 08, 2014 line 4.-DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO BANK'S MERGER WITH DEMURRER TO 4TH AMENDED COMPLAINT. Defendant's Demurrer to Fourth Amended Complaint is continued to August 8, 2014. Moving party and its counsel is ordered again (see CGC-14-537153 May 9, 2014 minute order) to comply with SFLR 2.6C and provide courtesy copy of the operative complaint no later than July 18, 2014 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date. Opposing party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.6B and provide courtesy copy of the opposition no later than July 18, 2014 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: 245 LEAVENWORTH STREET, LP. VS. NEGATU WOUBSHET et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Petition For Relief From Forfeiture, Ccp 1179
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, July 08, 2014 line 7. -DEFENDANT NEGATU WOUBSHET'S Notice Of Petition For Relief From Forfeiture, Ccp 1179. Defendant's Motion for Relief from Forfeiture is GRANTED subject to opposition, on condition that the full amount of rent/daily damages due to date and attorney's fees, if any, be remitted to the Plaintiff forthwith; and stipulation is extended for 6 months. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ZHUO HUI HUANG VS. LINDA WILSON et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Quash Service Of Summons On Fourth Amended Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, July 08, 2014 line 8. -DEFENDANT LINDA WILSON Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Quash Service Of Summons On Fourth Amended Complaint. Defendant's Motion to Quash Service of Summons is GRANTED in part and DENIED in part. Motion is GRANTED with leave to amend, subject to opposition for Plaintiff to attach a translation of the necessary documents certified under oath by a qualified interpreter. Motion is otherwise DENIED. Notice apprises the defendant of her right to relocation payment/amount on page 4. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: PLACE OF FRANK'S LLC, et al VS. ASHOK PATEL et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, July 08, 2014 line 12. -DEFENDANTS ASHOK PATEL and RICKESH PATELS' MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND. Defendant's Motion to Set Aside Default and Default Judgment is GRANTED, subject to opposition. Counsel, Daniel Berko and Sean Shaughnessy, are to (1) remit to Plaintiff attorney's fees and costs incurred in connection with default; and (2) pay to the Court $550 (sanction) no later than July 18, 2014. Defendant must file answer no later than July 8, 2014 by 4:00 p.m. = (501/REQ)
